description_long: This is a classic top hat with a tall, cylindrical crown and a flat top, rendered in a dark gray color. The hat features a wide, flat brim that extends evenly around the base, providing a distinct silhouette. A lighter gray band encircles the lower portion of the crown, adding a subtle decorative accent. The surface appears smooth and matte, typical of felt or wool hats, with no visible embellishments or logos. The proportions suggest it is designed for formal wear, often associated with traditional or ceremonial urban settings. The interior is likely hollow to accommodate a human head, and the structure is lightweight yet firm.
description: A tall, dark gray top hat with a flat crown, wide brim, and a lighter gray band around the base. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall cylindrical crown, flat top, and the wide brim with a visible lighter gray band.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the even width of the brim and the continuous lighter gray band around the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown and brim, with the lighter band still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the uniformity of the brim and crown.
